16.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

16.gl: great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent
16.kj: [phrase] aloud, elder(-est), [phrase] exceeding(-ly), [phrase] far, (man of) great (man, matter, thing,-er,-ness), high, long, loud, mighty, more, much, noble, proud thing, [idiom]

16.gl: to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten
16.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

16.gl: properly, a slaughter, i.e. the flesh of an animal; by implication, a sacrifice (the victim or the act)
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
16.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

16.gl: to slaughter an animal (usually in sacrifice)
